evals.prompt: Process a YouTube video about Meta AI data centers, CPO optical networking, and memory chips, then publish it to Notion and Obsidian.
evals.expected_output: The agent reads the full transcript, creates tags.json with 3-8 evidence-based subject tags, and both Notion Tags and Obsidian tags contain only semantic topics such as AI infrastructure, Meta, optical networking, and memory chips.

evals.prompt: 整理这个 Bilibili 视频并同步到 Obsidian。
evals.expected_output: The agent generates Chinese content tags from the transcript and does not emit bilibili, video, video-report, video-to-notes, transcript-source, or other provenance/workflow tags.

evals.prompt: Publish an already processed report whose transcript is empty.
evals.expected_output: The agent writes an empty tags list instead of inventing topics, and publishers do not substitute platform or workflow tags.
